video_api_params.negative_prompt: camera movement, panning, zooming, tilting, shaking, handheld, dolly, tracking shot, people walking, person moving, hands moving, characters appearing, animals, objects flying, objects falling, scene change, cut, transition, teleport, morphing, warping, distortion, deformation, identity drift, text overlay, watermark, low quality, blur, compression artifacts, rain falling, raindrops, smoke drift, fog motion, steam rising, mist drifting, water droplets, ripples, water motion, weather, precipitation, falling particles, leaves falling, dust falling

scenes.name: Tokyo Alleyway
scenes.image_prompt: Cinematic still photograph of a dark rainy Tokyo alleyway at night, neon signs reflecting in wet cobblestone puddles, empty narrow street, dim orange lamplight, deep shadows, atmospheric mist, no people, 21:9 ultrawide cinematic composition.
scenes.animation_prompt: locked‑off camera, tripod shot, studio setup, only the light sources animates.
